globalNews.title: Power outages hit France as record heatwave set to peak
globalNews.summary: About 68,000 homes in Brittany have been affected, with electricity unlikely to be fully restored until Wednesday night.

globalNews.title: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
globalNews.summary: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.

globalNews.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
globalNews.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

globalNews.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
globalNews.summary: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

globalNews.title: Biggest city in Crimea without power after Ukraine strikes
globalNews.summary: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.

cryptoNews.title: Trump cancels signing of housing bill with CBDC ban
cryptoNews.summary: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act included a provision that the US Federal Reserve was barred from issuing or creating a CBDC until 2030, but exempted certain stablecoins.

cryptoNews.title: Binance withdraws Greece-filed MiCA application.
cryptoNews.summary: Binance said it plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction just days ahead of the July 1 MiCA deadline, as unlicensed crypto firms are expected to wind down activities in the bloc.

cryptoNews.title: The Impossibility of Perfect Fairness in Transaction Ordering
cryptoNews.summary: Why perfect fairness cannot hold in asynchronous networks, and how different blockchains adopt different relaxations to fairness.

cryptoNews.title: How memecoin marketing moved from online speculation to real-world risk
cryptoNews.summary: From alcohol dares to head-shaving challenges, memecoin campaigns are turning engagement into exploitation.

cryptoNews.title: DeFi TVL drops 39% in 2026 amid market downturn and record hack activity
cryptoNews.summary: DeFi TVL fell 39% in 2026 as a broader market downturn and fallout from major exploits, including the Kelp DAO hack, weighed on the sector.

aiNews.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
aiNews.summary: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

aiNews.title: 3 days left to save up to $190 on your TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 pass
aiNews.summary: You have just 3 days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here.

aiNews.title: India’s MoEngage bets that the future of marketing is millions of AI agents
aiNews.summary: The all-cash deal gives MoEngage access to technology that assigns AI agents to individual customers.

aiNews.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
aiNews.summary: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise

aiNews.title: 4 days left to save up to $190 on TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026
aiNews.summary: Four days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 — the ultimate founder bootcamp — before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.
